name: post_message
description: Send a message to a Slack channel or direct message. Supports plain text, rich formatting with blocks, and attachments. Messages can include mentions, emoji, and formatting.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel ID or name where the message will be posted. Can be a channel ID (C1234567890) or channel name (#general).

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Plain text message content. Required if blocks are not provided.
parameters.example: Hello, this is a test message!

parameters.name: blocks
parameters.description: Array of block elements for rich formatting. Supports section, divider, image, and action blocks.

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Optional timestamp of the parent message if posting to a thread.

body.text: Hello, this is a test message!

text.text: *Hello!* This is a message with rich formatting.

message.text: Hello, this is a test message!
